hero.lead: We connect leaders, companies, and institutions across Ibero-America and the United States to foster business cooperation and strengthen regional economic integration.
about.lead: AIRE is an organization registered in Florida, U.S.A., in the process of qualifying as a non-profit association. It was created to promote the common interests of its members through business integration, public-private cooperation, and the articulation of ecosystems between Ibero-America and the United States.
about.purpose: To consolidate an Ibero-American network of economic leadership that facilitates business cooperation, supports members' access to information and institutional networks, and promotes sustainable and competitive collaborative projects.
about.mission: To design and operate an agile, reliable, and collaborative organization that brings together leaders by industry, articulates public-private collaboration, and turns ideas into concrete initiatives.
about.vision: To be the Ibero-American institutional benchmark in business diplomacy and economic cooperation, with real impact on productive integration between Ibero-America and the United States.
values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every action at AIRE.
values.integrity: We act with integrity, transparency, and responsibility.
values.collaboration: Working together as a driver of development.
values.innovation: We promote new ideas that enhance competitiveness.
values.diversity: Diversity of perspectives as a strength.
services.title.prefix: We bring stakeholders together, structure agendas, and promote
services.lead: AIRE operates as an institutional platform that connects sectoral and cross-cutting capabilities to support initiatives linked to development and international expansion.
services.card1.title: Public-Private Sectoral Roundtables
services.card1.text: Strategic dialogue spaces to analyze shared challenges, identify opportunities, and generate joint action proposals.
services.card2.title: Institutional Engagement and Networking Tables
services.card2.text: Coordination spaces that promote the exchange of best practices and sector cooperation among key stakeholders.
services.card3.title: Project design and management
services.card3.text: Institutional support for international expansion initiatives, investment, inter-company cooperation, and sector development.
services.card4.title: Industry Briefs, Studies, and Sectoral Radars
services.card4.text: Strategic content oriented to decision-making, developed with an applied and multi-sector perspective.
services.card5.title: AIRE Academy
services.card5.text: Programs, workshops, and training aimed at business leaders, with a focus on internationalization, management, and innovation.
services.card6.title: Institutional orientation sessions
services.card6.text: Institutional orientation sessions for members, channeled through specialized Sector Directorates.
structure.lead: AIRE brings together diverse profiles, international experience, and a collaborative vocation. It is built on commitment, ethics, and joint work.
structure.card1.title: Governing Board
structure.card1.text: Strategic leadership body that sets institutional guidelines, work priorities, and oversees compliance with AIRE's mission.
structure.card2.title: Sector Directorates
structure.card2.text: 12 directorates representing key industries: Technology, Tourism, Real Estate, Startups, Arts & Culture, International Trade, and more.
structure.card3.title: Cross-cutting offices
structure.card3.text: Strategic and technical support: Institutional Relations, Academy, Professional Services, Communications, and Logistics.
structure.card4.title: Chapters and representations
structure.card4.text: Institutional presence across countries and regions to strengthen territorial cooperation and support members in local contexts.
board.title: Governing Board
board.subtitle: Officers
board.javier.name: Javier Cremades
board.javier.bio: Spanish lawyer and academic with a global profile, President of the World Jurist Association and founder of Cremades & Calvo-Sotelo. An expert in constitutional law, human rights, and digital law, he promotes international networks that connect legal leaders and position AIRE at an institutional level globally.
board.elisa.name: Elisa Weiner
board.elisa.bio: Background in institutional relations, internationalization, and the development of strategic partnerships. Specialized in convening companies, leaders, and institutions, she fosters cooperation and connection internationally.
board.monica.name: Mónica González
board.martin.name: Martín Bettiol
directorates.title: Sector Directorates
directorates.claudio.name: Claudio Resnick
directorates.claudio.bio: Entrepreneur and executive producer, founder and CEO of ARPI GROUP, with over two decades of experience in the creative industry.
directorates.emilio.name: Emilio Salomon
directorates.emilio.bio: Academic specialized in knowledge management, founder of Social International University, and Vice President for Latin America at FIAM.
directorates.silvana.name: Silvana Ovsejevich Jensen
directorates.silvana.bio: Architect, set designer, and cultural manager, with a track record in developing arts and culture projects internationally.
directorates.silvia.name: Silvia Torres Carbonell
directorates.silvia.bio: Leading voice in the entrepreneurial ecosystem, Emeritus President of the Entrepreneurship Center at IAE Business School, and an angel investor.
directorates.patricio.name: Patricio Baigorrotegui
directorates.patricio.bio: Co-founder of Good Morning Sports and SPORTBIZ EUROPE/LATAM, with over 20 years of experience in the sports industry.
directorates.lucrecia.name: Lucrecia Vanni
directorates.lucrecia.bio: CEO of Ecopolys Europa, with a track record in technology, sustainability, and innovation.
directorates.pablo.name: Pablo Fera
directorates.pablo.bio: Expert in international trade, creator of “Pensar antes de exportar” and president of Fundación Más Valor Exportador.
directorates.fernando.name: Fernando Tapia
directorates.fernando.bio: Executive with over 30 years in tourism management, President of CAMTUR and Director of Operations at Sacramento Management.
directorates.josefina.name: Josefina Cura
directorates.josefina.bio: Engineer and sustainability consultant, co-founder of EIG and specialist in circular economy and ESG strategies.
coords.title: Coordinating network and representations
coords.lead: AIRE has sectoral coordinators and local representations that articulate the institutional presence across different regions.
coords.offices.title: Cross-cutting Offices
coords.chapters.title: Chapters and Representations
memberships.lead: Being part of AIRE means joining an Ibero-American network of companies and leaders who share a strategic, institutional, long-term perspective.
plans.standard.name: Corporate Standard
plans.standard.desc: For organizations that want to actively integrate into the AIRE ecosystem.
plans.standard.item1: Preferred access to events and sector roundtables
plans.standard.item2: Presence in the institutional member directory
plans.standard.item3: Participation as an observer in sector roundtables
plans.standard.item4: Access to 1 institutional sector strategic orientation session
plans.standard.item6: Institutional content: briefs and opportunity radar
plans.premium.name: Corporate Premium
plans.premium.desc: A higher level of institutional and strategic involvement.
plans.premium.item2: Prominent institutional participation in industry forums
plans.premium.item4: Greater visibility in communications and events
plans.premium.item5: Expanded access to sector dialogue forums
plans.strategic.name: Strategic AIRE Membership
plans.strategic.desc: An active institutional role, supporting long-term development.
contact.lead: If you'd like to learn more about the Association, explore a membership, propose an institutional partnership, or make a general inquiry, please contact our team.

footer.legal: AIRE is a nonprofit organization registered in Florida as a Business League, dedicated to promoting the common interests of its members and strengthening the Ibero-American business ecosystem.
